allow: Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readxl\); df <- readxl::read_excel\('inst/extdata/temp_field.xlsx'\); str\(df\); cat\('\\nNames:', names\(df\), '\\n'\); cat\('\\nhead:\\n'\); print\(head\(df\)\)")

Bash(Rscript -e "library\(soyplant\); exists\('field'\); if\(exists\('field'\)\) { cat\('field found, class:', class\(field\), '\\n'\); cat\('dim:', nrow\(field\), 'x', ncol\(field\), '\\n'\) } else { cat\('field NOT found\\n'\) }")
